description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three spacious wooden shelves supported by a black metal frame. The wood planks have a weathered, rustic finish with visible grain and a mix of brown and greenish hues, giving the piece a reclaimed look. The frame is constructed from thick, angular metal bars with cross-bracing on the sides and back for added stability and a distinctive geometric appearance. The corners are reinforced with metal plates and rivets, enhancing both durability and visual interest. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying various items. This shelving unit would fit well in urban environments such as garages, workshops, lofts, or outdoor patios.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with three weathered wooden shelves and a black metal frame featuring cross-bracing and reinforced corners. Its open design and rustic finish make it ideal for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wooden shelves, open access, and the metal frame with visible cross-bracing on the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the X-shaped metal cross-bracing and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the back cross-bracing and the full width of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the X-shaped cross-bracing and shelf depth.
